name: HarborKind Dental
sourceInspiration: Live source inspected: Premier Choice Dental implant landing page at https://premierchoicedentalimplants.com/. Mirrored conversion signals: price anchor, free consultation CTA, trust bullets, treatment option segmentation, candidate-style intake, expert proof, financing clarity, transformations/proof rhythm, and FAQ objection handling. No source brand name, exact copy, protected assets, testimonials, treatment results, or proprietary claims were reused.
positioningAngle: Dental clinic appointment funnel for new patients who want a clear smile plan, comfort-focused care, and transparent treatment options before committing.
headline: Walk in unsure. Leave with a clear smile plan.
designNotes: Live dental source: Premier Choice Dental implant consultation funnel.
Warm clinical palette with porcelain, mint, mineral teal, coral, and graphite.
Hero combines a visible offer card, CTA pair, and trust cards above the fold.
Treatment path cards segment preventive, cosmetic, emergency, family, and implant needs.
Cards and buttons animate with transform, border, shadow, and opacity only.
conversionNotes: Primary conversion goal: book a free smile consultation.
Price anchor and new-patient offer are visible in the hero.
Patient concerns around cost, comfort, insurance, and treatment complexity are answered before final CTA.
No invented reviews or before-and-after outcomes were used.
Schema marks the page as a Dentist website, and Website Storage marks it as Dental Clinic / FUNNEL.
frameworkMapping: Big Promise / Desired Outcome: Walk in unsure and leave with a clear smile plan.
Empathy / Connection: Patients may have pain, anxiety, overdue care, or cost concerns.
Opportunity Vehicle / Solution: Free smile consultation with scan, exam, and treatment roadmap.
Before vs After / Gap & Bridge: From uncertainty to clear treatment path and appointment type.
USP / Unique Selling Proposition: Comfort-first planning with payment clarity before commitment.
Offer Positioning / No-Brainer Deal: New patient clarity visit with exam, digital x-rays, and roadmap.
Social Proof / Instant Credibility: Digital scan planning and transparent care paths.
Risk Reversal / Lower The Bar: Request is not confirmed until the team contacts the patient.
Authority / Trust The Source: Care is organized by clinical need, comfort, timing, and budget.
Urgency / Take Action Today: Same-week openings and emergency call path.
FAQ / Concerns & Objections: Offer details, anxiety, insurance, financing, and implants.

name: JusticeBridge Legal V2
sourceInspiration: Live source inspected: Maloyan Law Free Case Review landing page at https://www.maloyanlaw.com/landing-page. Mirrored conversion signals: case-evaluation promise, early intake form, case-type segmentation, phone/urgency rhythm, three-step process, proof positioning, risk reversal, and repeated consultation CTAs. No source brand name, exact copy, protected assets, testimonials, settlement claims, or proprietary content were reused.
positioningAngle: Premium law firm funnel for people who need a fast legal triage path before deadlines, insurers, employers, or opposing parties set the pace.
headline: Find out if your legal problem needs action, today.
designNotes: Non-Dribbble live web source: Maloyan Law free case review landing page.
High-contrast legal funnel with oxblood urgency bar, warm paper surface, ink panels, and brass accents.
Hero keeps the intake form visible above the fold to mirror high-intent legal conversion flow.
Case-type tiles reduce cognitive friction before deeper legal review.
Cards and buttons animate with transform, border, shadow, and opacity only.
conversionNotes: Primary conversion goal: book a free case review.
The source funnel pattern was adapted into segmented intake, three-step process, proof, risk reversal, urgency, and FAQ.
Legal disclaimers clarify that submitting the form does not create an attorney-client relationship.
No invented results or testimonials were used.
Repeated CTAs appear in the hero, process/urgency path, final CTA, and footer.
frameworkMapping: Big Promise / Desired Outcome: Find out if the legal problem needs action today.
Empathy / Connection: Visitors arrive with fragments, pressure, and uncertainty.
Opportunity Vehicle / Solution: A structured free case review identifies risk and next steps.
Before vs After / Gap & Bridge: From fear and scattered documents to a decision map.
USP / Unique Selling Proposition: Deadline-aware legal triage without pressure to hire.
Offer Positioning / No-Brainer Deal: Free, private, no-obligation review.
Social Proof / Instant Credibility: Process transparency replaces fabricated outcomes.
Risk Reversal / Lower The Bar: Legal relationship disclaimer and no-obligation copy.
Authority / Trust The Source: Clear checks for deadline, documents, leverage, and harm.
Urgency / Take Action Today: Do not let the other side set the pace first.
FAQ / Concerns & Objections: Documents, cost, relationship scope, and fit are answered.

name: JusticeBridge Legal
sourceInspiration: Live source inspected: Legal Point, Law Firm Landing Page Design on Dribbble by Phenomenon Studio. Mirrored strategy signals: premium legal visual hierarchy, section rhythm, trust placement, CTA pacing, muted authority palette, and service-first funnel structure. No source brand name, exact copy, protected images, testimonials, or proprietary claims were reused.
positioningAngle: Premium law firm consultation funnel for cautious prospects who need clear legal direction before choosing representation.
headline: Know where your case stands before you choose representation.
designNotes: Premium legal editorial direction with EB Garamond headings and Lato body copy.
Deep ink, warm ivory, authority blue, and brass accent palette.
Every section uses a mirrored paper-grid or ink-toned background treatment.
Cards and buttons include transform, border, shadow, and opacity animations.
Stock legal/consultation imagery is used as human trust evidence.
conversionNotes: Primary conversion goal: book a free case review.
Trust badges appear near the hero CTA and intake form.
The form explains that submission does not create an attorney-client relationship.
Risk reversal is handled with no-obligation, private intake, and referral honesty copy.
FAQ removes concerns around preparation, fit, legal advice, and urgency.
frameworkMapping: Big Promise / Desired Outcome: Know where your case stands before choosing representation.
Empathy / Connection: Most people wait too long because the first legal step feels unclear.
Opportunity Vehicle / Solution: A guided free case review organizes facts and next steps.
Before vs After / Gap & Bridge: From scattered documents and deadlines to a documented case snapshot.
USP / Unique Selling Proposition: Senior legal triage before the sales conversation.
Offer Positioning / No-Brainer Deal: Free review, private intake, no obligation.
Social Proof / Instant Credibility: Transparent process proof instead of invented outcomes.
Risk Reversal / Lower The Bar: Clear referral honesty and no forced representation.
Authority / Trust The Source: Practical legal review focused on early mistakes and document priorities.
Urgency / Take Action Today: Book before the next deadline decides the path.
FAQ / Concerns & Objections: Preparation, advice scope, fit, and timing are answered.

name: Custom Signal
sourceInspiration: Live source inspected: https://www.convertrium.com/. Mirrored strategy signals: section rhythm, CTA placement, visual hierarchy. No source brand name, exact copy, logo, images, testimonials, or protected assets were reused.
positioningAngle: Premium site for Custom prospects focused on capture qualified leads.
headline: Custom visitors know exactly why to act, and what happens next.
designNotes: Inspired by convertrium.com layout rhythm, spacing logic, and CTA placement.
Source color signals observed: #FFFFFF, #FD8F48. Final palette is original.
No obvious animation library detected from HTML.
No obvious video embed detected.
No obvious form detected in static HTML.
conversionNotes: Primary conversion goal: Capture qualified leads.
Primary CTA: Request the Growth Plan.
Reorganized into the required 11-part conversion framework.
Mirrors funnel logic only, not protected content.
frameworkMapping: Big Promise / Desired Outcome: Custom prospects get a clear path to action.
Empathy / Connection: Your visitor is interested, but not yet convinced.
Opportunity Vehicle / Solution: A guided Custom conversion path.
Before vs After / Gap & Bridge: From passive browsing to qualified action.
USP / Unique Selling Proposition: Mirrored strategy, original brand.
Offer Positioning / No-Brainer Deal: Request the Growth Plan is the obvious first step.
Social Proof / Instant Credibility: Proof appears where hesitation appears.
Risk Reversal / Lower The Bar: A simple first step beats a hard sell.
Authority / Trust The Source: The method is visible.
Urgency / Take Action Today: Delay has a cost.
FAQ / Concerns & Objections: The page answers the questions that slow action.
